outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate volatility expected due to positive Total GEX across all expirations, which suppresses large directional moves.
outlook.summary: The market is pinned between heavy Call Resonance at 720 and Put Resonance at 695/685. Positive GEX creates a stable, mean-reverting environment, while reverse smirk skews in Weekly and Monthly expirations hint at underlying bullish momentum. Watch the 707 Max Pain magnet.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Major Call OI concentration across 0DTE, WEEKLY, and MONTHLY expirations. Positive GEX creates an immovable ceiling.
RESONANCE: Massive Put OI defense, led by a 70k block in the WEEKLY expiration, backed by 0DTE and MONTHLY structure.
RESONANCE: Major structural support with over 40k OI in 0DTE and significant MONTHLY backing, containing downside tail risk.
CONFLUENCE: Massive Put and Call open interest in 0DTE and MONTHLY expirations create a high-friction gamma trap.
WEEKLY Max Pain aligning with high Call OI. Dealer hedging will naturally pull the spot price toward this level.
Extreme 0DTE volume on both Calls and Puts indicates intense intraday dealer hedging friction right at the spot price.
